auth.tagline: Sign in to make your predictions and climb the leaderboard.
auth.signInFailed: Could not sign in. Please try again.

groups.title: My Groups
groups.emptyDescription: Create your own pool or join a friend's with their invite link.
groups.createSubtitle: You'll be its admin and get an invite link to share.
groups.readySubtitle: Share this link so friends can request to join. You approve each request.
groups.createError: Could not create the group. Please try again.
groups.copyError: Could not copy the link. You can select and copy it manually.

membership.groupUnavailableDescription: This group could not be loaded. The invite link may be invalid.
membership.pendingBody: Your request to join {{name}} is awaiting approval from its admin.
membership.rejectedBody: Your request to join {{name}} wasn't approved. You can ask again.
membership.gateJoinBody: You're not a member of this group yet. Send a request and its admin will let you in.
membership.linkJoinBody: Send a request and the group admin will let you in.
membership.notFoundBody: This invite link is invalid or the group no longer exists.
membership.requestError: Could not send your request. Please try again.
membership.reRequestError: Could not resubmit your request. Please try again.

fixtures.title: Fixtures
fixtures.emptyDescription: Match data hasn't been loaded yet. Check back once the schedule is published.

predictions.title: Your predictions
predictions.emptyDescription: Predictions will open as soon as the fixtures are scheduled.
predictions.lockedError: This match already started — predictions are locked.
predictions.saveError: Could not save your prediction. Please try again.
predictions.revealDescription: Everyone's picks become visible once this match starts.
predictions.listErrorDescription: They’ll appear once the connection recovers.
predictions.noneDescription: No one in the group predicted this match.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: Everyone in the group is listed. Points update after each results ingestion run.
leaderboard.errorDescription: The standings will appear once the connection recovers.
leaderboard.emptyDescription: Approved members appear here as soon as they join.

standings.title: Group standings
standings.emptyDescription: Group tables appear once the tournament fixtures have been loaded.

admin.predictionModeDescription: Choose when members can submit predictions. Lazy: edit each match until 10 minutes before its kickoff. Strict: all group-stage picks lock 10 minutes before the first match, and all knockout picks lock 10 minutes before the first knockout match.
admin.modeFrozen: The tournament has started — the prediction mode can no longer be changed.
admin.modeError: Could not change the prediction mode. Please try again.
admin.noRequestsDescription: When someone asks to join this group, they'll show up here for approval.
admin.decisionError: Could not save that decision. Please try again.
admin.noMembersDescription: Approved members show up here, where you can remove them from the group.
admin.removeConfirm: Remove {{name}} from {{group}}? Their predictions are kept but they drop off the leaderboard.
admin.removeError: Could not remove that member. Please try again.

superadmin.title: Superadmin
superadmin.subtitle: Oversight of every group across the pool. Read-only.
superadmin.emptyDescription: Groups created by anyone in the pool will appear here.
superadmin.ownerOnly: No joiners yet — only the owner.

errors.genericDescription: Please try again in a moment.
